zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Dalton於從1469年到1490年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Dalton45歲，母親Elizabeth Isabel Fleming41歲。他於1494年之前與Anne Radcliffe結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年12月25日。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Dalton was born from 1469 to 1490, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Dalton, was 45 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabel Fleming, was 41. He married Anne Radcliffe before 1494. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 December 1520.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Dalton est né du 1469 au 1490, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Dalton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabel Fleming, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Anne Radcliffe avant 1494. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1520.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Dalton von 1469 bis 1490 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Dalton 45 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Isabel Fleming 41. Er hat vor 1494 Anne Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1520.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Dalton è nato il da 1469 a 1490 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Dalton, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Isabel Fleming, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Anne Radcliffe prima del 1494. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1520.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Daltonがから1469年まで1490年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Daltonは45歳，母Elizabeth Isabel Flemingは41歳であった。1494年以前にAnne Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年12月25日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Dalton(이)가 1469년 부터 1490년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Dalton(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabel Fleming(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1494년 이전 Anne Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 12월 25일 사망했다.
